case_title: CATHERINE SALTER VS. THE FINEST JEWELRY.COM, INC.

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE RE: NON-PAYMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALTER, CATHERINE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-05-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO COURT CALL APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ROGER KUO. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 SERVED MAR-20-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THE FINEST JEWELRY.COM, INC.
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER & ANSWER FILED. (RE: REQUEST TO VACATE DISMISSAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALTER, CATHERINE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE FINEST JEWELRY.COM, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-08-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROGER KUO--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL RETURNED: RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD
ORDER (SC-105A)<RE: REQUEST TO VACATE DISMISSAL AND GIVE NEW COURT DATE>. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALTER, CATHERINE
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-05-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED EVERY 4 MONTHS UNTIL AMOUNT PAID IN FULL. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1,000.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING JANUARY 31, 2015, AND $1,000 ON THE LAST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL THE FULL AMOUNT OF $14,720 AND PLAINTIFF'S COSTS ARE PAID. DEFENDANT SHALL ALSO PAY PLAINTIFF $500.00 ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 30, 2014 AND $500.00 ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 31, 2014. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, PLAINTIFF MAY ASK FOR JUDGMENT ON THE OUTSTANDING BALANCE, UP TO $10,000.00", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT THROUGH COURT CALL. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROGER KUO--PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEARAT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) GRANTED

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROGER KUO--PRESIDENT.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR NEW HEARING, PER SC-105A COURT ORDER HEARING SET FOR NOV-05-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROGER KUO--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
